scenarios.title: Damage caused by unauthorized third-party repair
scenarios.description: The customer had their iPhone repaired by a non-Apple authorized technician, leading to hardware failure.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider (“AASP”).

scenarios.reasoning: Damage resulted from service performed by an unauthorized provider, which is excluded from coverage per section 4.2(ii)(d). Hence, no service fee is applicable and the claim is denied.
